steps.title: Find the slope of line h
steps.content:
Line $h$ contains $(18{,}130)$, $(23{,}160)$, and $(26{,}178)$. Use two of the points to find the slope.
$$\frac{160-130}{23-18}=\frac{30}{5}=6$$

steps.title: Translate the line down
steps.content:
Moving line $h$ down $5$ units subtracts $5$ from each $y$-value.
$$y=6x+22-5$$
$$y=6x+17$$

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content: At the $x$-intercept, $y=0$. $$0=6x+17$$ $$-17=6x$$ $$x=-\frac{17}{6}$$ So the intercept is $(-\frac{17}{6}{,}0)$. The answer is D.
